zh.lifeSummary: 當John Neville於大約1418年出生在英國瓦維其可爾奧維斯利 格林時，他的父親Ralph Neville27歲，母親Mary Ferrers25歲。他於大約1457年與Margaret Plumpton在英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾結婚。他去世於1481年3月17日在英國林可爾史爾阿爾索普享年64歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾阿爾索普。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Neville was born about 1418, in Oversley Green, Warwickshire, England, his father, Ralph Neville, was 27 and his mother, Mary Ferrers, was 25. He married Margaret Plumpton about 1457, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 17 March 1481, in Althorpe, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Althorpe, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Neville est né environ 1418, à Oversley Green, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Neville, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mary Ferrers, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Plumpton environ 1457, à Plumpton by Ecclesall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 17 mars 1481, à Althorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Althorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: John Nevilleが約1418年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアオバースリー グレンで生まれた時，父Ralph Nevilleは27歳，母Mary Ferrersは25歳であった。約1457年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン ビー エククレサルでMargaret Plumptonと結婚した。彼は1481年3月17日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルソルペで64歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Neville(이)가 대략 1418년 영국 워윅실르 버슬리 그린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Neville(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Ferrers(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1457년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 c클사에서 Margaret Plumpton(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1481년 3월 17일 영국 링코실르 알소에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 알소에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Neville nasceu aproximadamente 1418, em Oversley Green, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Neville, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mary Ferrers, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Plumpton aproximadamente 1457, em Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 17 de março de 1481, em Althorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Althorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Of, Plumpton, Yorkshire, England: плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Neville родился около 1418 г. в местности овирсли грин, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Neville было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Ferrers, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Plumpton около 1457 г. в местности плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 17 марта 1481 г. в местности алтаурп, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности алтаурп, линколншир, Англия.
